headline: Assessing Rollins (ROL) Valuation After Strong Q1 2026 Results And Analyst Upgrades
summary: Rollins (ROL) is back in focus after a strong Q1 2026, with revenue topping Wall Street expectations and earnings holding steady, as analysts highlight the support from its recurring contract base. See our latest analysis for Rollins. Despite the solid Q1 print, Rollins' 1-year total shareholder return is down 3.73%, and the year-to-date share price return is down 7.46%. However, the recent 7-day share price return of 3.27% suggests some momentum may be returning after a weaker 90-day...
